events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar work with Queen shaped generations of rock music.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Enduring Rock Star
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music and pop culture. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – talk about prophetic!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, concluded on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly legendary event.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: This day marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we lost The King of Rock & Roll. Remembering the unparalleled legacy of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: This day marks 30 years since the tragic death of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Three decades since a true hip-hop icon was taken too soon. Remembering the enduring impact of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: This day marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, the world lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover walk remains one of the most famous in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the inimitable Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude have made The Pretenders a true force in rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Forever a rock 'n' roll star.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity remains as powerful as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed how we listened to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007's enduring legacy and cinematic adventures. What's your favourite Bond film or gadget?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: This day marks the birthday of John Lennon, who would have been 86.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and music of John Lennon. His legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles released The White Album (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: A Diverse Masterpiece
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece that showed their incredible range.
